overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic coastal city in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a commercial street with neon signage to an abandoned waterfront plaza featuring the Grand Imperial building and a prominent roller coaster structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage and elevated highway

events.description: passing a red traffic light mounted on a pole to the right
slight right turn while continuing forward along the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the asphalt road toward a modern commercial building with prominent neon signage

entered.detail: low-rise modern building with horizontal lines and large neon pink signage on the facade
tall futuristic towers with holographic advertisements and glass facades
red traffic signal mounted on a black metal pole
elevated concrete highway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial street with towering skyscrapers visible in the background. The camera passes a traffic light and approaches a modern building with prominent neon signage, while an elevated highway overpass looms on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with amusement park structure visible

events.description: transitioning from asphalt road to concrete sidewalk along the waterfront
graffiti-covered wall comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk with the ocean visible to the right and amusement park structures ahead

entered.detail: large metal amusement park roller coaster structure along the waterfront
large commercial building with prominent orange signage reading GRAND IMPERIAL
long concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
calm blue ocean visible beyond the amusement park structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a waterfront promenade with a roller coaster structure visible against the ocean backdrop. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk, passing a graffiti-covered wall on the left while approaching the Grand Imperial building ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: entering a covered underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
exiting the underpass into an open abandoned plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with graffiti walls, then passing through a dark underpass into an open area

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel passing beneath the elevated highway
dilapidated wooden pavilion with open sides and weathered roof

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside a prominent graffiti-covered wall through a narrowing corridor, the camera enters a dark underpass beneath the highway. Upon exiting, the scene transitions to an open abandoned plaza with dilapidated wooden structures and the Grand Imperial building now closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned waterfront plaza with derelict stalls and overgrown vegetation

events.description: passing by abandoned market stalls and derelict vehicles scattered throughout the plaza

agents.ego_description: exploring the abandoned plaza area with scattered debris, overgrown plants, and derelict structures

entered.detail: derelict wooden market stall with collapsed roof and scattered debris
metal basketball hoop mounted on a tall pole
derelict cars and vans scattered around the plaza with broken windows
tall palm trees with dry fronds scattered throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a wide abandoned plaza with weathered wooden decking, scattered debris, and derelict vehicles. The Grand Imperial building dominates the right side while palm trees and overgrown vegetation fill the left, with the roller coaster structure visible in the distance beyond the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into a desolate, abandoned waterfront plaza. It begins by walking along a futuristic street beneath towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway overpass, passing a traffic light and glowing neon signage. As the camera moves forward, the urban density gives way to a waterfront promenade where a distant roller coaster structure appears against the ocean backdrop. The scene then shifts through a narrowing corridor alongside a graffiti-covered wall and into a dark underpass, before emerging into an open area of dilapidated wooden structures. Finally, the view expands across a wide, weathered plaza filled with debris and derelict vehicles, with the Grand Imperial building dominating the right side and overgrown palm trees lining the left.
